hero.title: BRINGING MUSIC
hero.subtitle: WON Media – Vietnam's leading music distribution & copyright management company.

items.title: Social Media Business
items.desc: WON Media is an official partner of YouTube, Facebook, and TikTok in Vietnam. We provide marketing services and build strong social media channels for artists, content producers, and businesses worldwide.

items.title: Music Distribution
items.desc: Distribute music to global platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Facebook, TikTok, Deezer, Amazon Music, and more.

items.title: Copyright Content Exploitation
items.desc: Distribute copyrighted content across various genres (movies, music, kids, news, sports…) on online platforms and television.

items.title: Copyright Services
items.desc: Protect digital content copyrights for partners and manage music copyright ownership in the digital environment.

footer.address: No. 36, Alley 189 Hoang Hoa Tham, Ba Dinh, Hanoi
